name: agricontract-phase2-docx-final
description: AgriContract Phase 2 final DOCX generators using the canonical acdocx pipeline.

scripts.test: node --check acdocx.js && node --check md_to_acdocx.js && for f in build01.js build02.js build03_part1.js build03_part2.js build04.js build05.js build06.js build07.js build08.js build_sds_full.js docx_output.js; do node --check "$f"; done && /usr/bin/python3 -m py_compile materialize_toc.py
